Sport|Olympics

Boxingwill play a key part at the 2024Olympic Gamesin Paris.

While there are doubts as to whether or not thesport will feature at the Olympicsbeyond theParis Games, attention now turns to in-ring matters in the French capital.

Super heavyweight Delicious Orie isperhaps the standout name for Team GB, looking to follow in the footsteps of idol Anthony Joshua.

USA’s Joshua Edwards, however, will no doubt provide competition – having become the first super heavyweight boxer from Houston to qualify forOlympic Boxingsince a certain George Forman.

The women’s tournament will see, amongst other stories, beaten Tokyo 2020 finalist Beatriz Ferreira look to avenge her defeat against defending champion Kellie Harrington, should they meet again.
